Dialog.name: MSG_703_000
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}This large Shadow is of the Hierophant Arcana![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_703_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}We don't know what it'll do. Be ready for anything![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_703_100
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 0 6}That skill seems to instill fear in its opponents![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_703_110
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 2 0 6}You'll be paralyzed if you succumb to the fear. Don't push yourself, and try to calm down![n]{f 1 1}
